title: Revised direction issued to Devon County Council: December 2025
body: "This direction requires the council to co-operate with a Department for Education Children’s Services Commissioner appointed by the Secretary of State for Education.  It follows:   a 13 May 2025 Ofsted report that judged children’s services to be inadequate an independent report by Nigel Richardson, the Devon County Council Children’s Services Commissioner at the time   This direction replaces the earlier statutory direction issued to the council in June 2025. "

taxons.title: Inspections of local authority children's services
